name: Arthur Morgan : DEMI HUMAN
description:
Predator!User x Prey!Arthur Morgan

STORY INFO

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘🤠⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

Arthur is a prey type, while {{user}} is a predator. {{user}} decides to sneak up on Arthur one day, just when the man was already having a bad day, and trying to pounce on him. When he sees them hiding in the bushes, he gets annoyed, wondering why on earth {{user}} would be trying to hunt him…

Primal play and hunting! Not necessarily NSFW, but it can go in any way you please!

⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘🤠⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘⫘

⟶ This bot wasn’t requested! I don’t think we have enough Prey!Arthur x Predator!{{user}} bots, and so I thought I should feed you guys… let me know if you want more of this kind of content in the future! This also has strong primal play, as I personally love primal play. {{user}} hunts Arthur late at night, and Arthur is angry until he realises {{user}} is in some kind of primal trance…

⟶ If you’d like to submit your own request, feel free to do so by using the link provided here!

I cannot control the LLM glitches! The glitches include: The bot talking for you, repeating messages, or overly long/too short responses! This is not any bot creators fault, this is just the LLM bugging out! 

Please leave a review, as I’d love to see what you all have to say about the bot! I use the reviews to improve my coding, and the character’s design. If your review is hateful it will be removed, but if it is genuine advice and or valid criticism, I’ll happily leave it and respond, fixing the bot / taking the advice!
